title: BackupModel
description: The BackupModel describes the configuration and status of a Pinecone backup.

source_index_name.description: Name of the index from which the backup was taken.

name.description: Optional user-defined name for the backup.

description.description: Optional description providing context for the backup.

status.description: Current status of the backup (e.g., Initializing, Ready, Failed).

cloud.description: Cloud provider where the backup is stored.

region.description: Cloud region where the backup is stored.

dimension.description: The dimensions of the vectors to be inserted in the index.

metric.description:
The distance metric to be used for similarity search. You can use 'euclidean', 'cosine', or 'dotproduct'. If the 'vector_type' is 'sparse', the metric must be 'dotproduct'. If the `vector_type` is `dense`, the metric defaults to 'cosine'.
Possible values: `cosine`, `euclidean`, or `dotproduct`.

record_count.description: Total number of records in the backup.

namespace_count.description: Number of namespaces in the backup.

size_bytes.description: Size of the backup in bytes.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the backup was created.
